title: poa neesii
intro: Poa neesii, also known as Mountain Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa neesii include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to improve wound healing and reduce inflammation. Poa neesii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
